data.title: GSS Energy Rights Issue Sees Strong Investor Interest
data.description:
GSS Energy Limited (SG:41F) has released an update.

GSS Energy Limited has announced the results of its rights issue, with a subscription level of approximately 71.91%, translating to 436.67 million new shares. Despite falling short of the total 607.22 million shares available, the uptake reflects a significant investor interest in the company’s prospects. This rights issue is a key move in GSS Energy’s strategy to enhance its capital base.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Holdings in Spirent Communications
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Spirent Communications ( (GB:SPT) ).

Morgan Stanley has adjusted its holdings in Spirent Communications PLC, reducing its voting rights from 8.339745% to 7.858413%. This change reflects a disposal of financial instruments and impacts the shareholder’s influence within the company, potentially affecting strategic decisions and signaling shifts in investor confidence.

More about Spirent Communications

Spirent Communications PLC is a UK-based company operating in the telecommunications industry. The company specializes in providing testing, analysis, and assurance solutions for networks, cybersecurity, and positioning.

data.title: SQM Announces Online Bidding for Spodumene Concentrate
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Sociedad Quimica Y Minera SA ( (SQM) ) has provided an update.

SQM International Lithium (SQMi), a division of Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A., has announced an online bidding event for 10,000 tons of spodumene concentrate, set to take place on January 14, 2025, via the Metalshub platform. This event highlights SQM’s strategic engagement in the global battery supply chain, offering stakeholders an opportunity to secure a critical resource for battery production, thus reinforcing its market positioning in the renewable energy sector.

More about Sociedad Quimica Y Minera SA

Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A. (SQM) is a global company listed on the New York Stock Exchange and the Santiago Stock Exchange. It develops and produces a diverse range of products for industries such as health, nutrition, renewable energy, and technology, with a focus on maintaining a leading position in the lithium, potassium nitrate, iodine, and thermo-solar salts markets.

YTD Price Performance: 0.0%

Average Trading Volume: 1,059,589

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $9.98B

ITV plc ( (GB:ITV) ) has shared an update.

ITV plc has announced its total voting rights and capital structure as of December 31, 2024, which includes 3,911,095,827 ordinary shares, with 120,479,277 held in treasury, resulting in 3,790,616,550 voting rights. data.title: Blue Owl Capital III Merger Gains Shareholder Support
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Blue Owl Capital Corporation III ( (OBDE) ).

Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE) and Blue Owl Capital Corporation (OBDC) announced that proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis recommend shareholders vote in favor of their merger. The merger aims to enhance OBDC’s scale and diversification, making it the second-largest publicly traded business development company by total assets. The combined entity is expected to benefit from improved trading dynamics and long-term expense savings from operating synergies, according to the advisors.

More about Blue Owl Capital Corporation III

Blue Owl Capital Corporation (OBDC) and Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE) are specialty finance companies focused on lending to U.S. middle-market companies. OBDC had investments in 219 portfolio companies with a fair value of $13.4 billion, while OBDE had investments in 185 portfolio companies valued at $4.2 billion. Both are regulated as business development companies under the Investment Company Act of 1940 and are part of Blue Owl’s Credit platform.

YTD Price Performance: 0%

Average Trading Volume: 324,559

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.81B

Find detailed analytics on OBDE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Vibropower Corporation Limited is facing a mandatory conditional cash offer from Mr. Benedict Chen Onn Meng to acquire all issued and paid-up ordinary shares, excluding treasury shares and those already owned by him. This development follows a series of announcements confirming the offer’s unconditional status, indicating a significant shift in the company’s shareholding structure. Investors are likely to watch closely as the completion of this offer could impact Vibropower’s market dynamics.
